LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1994, DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE NOTICE STATES THE PRECISE SUM DUE. CONFLICT IN EVIDENCE BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION PARAGRAPH 3 & 4 VS. BURTON DECLARATION PARAGRAPH 4.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 02
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAKE, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1388 CALIFORNIA ST, ROOM 303, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES PREMISES BY 30-SEP-94, BY 12 NOON, THE PLTF. SHALL PAY DEFT. THE SUM OF $300.00. IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE PREMISES HE SHALL FORFEIT SUM OF $300.00 AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF $2300.00, BACK RENT, ETC; (SEE FILE FOR DETAIL)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
